raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I was charged with an unrecgnized transaction. The credit card was locked and a new one was requested. This is with Citi. 


The Card was never received, lost by XXXX ( XXXX ), in the meantime, additional transaction were posted in my account. All were properly reported. 

On XX/XX/XXXX a new credit card was sent by XXXX ( not received ) On XX/XX/XXXX a new card was shipped by citi, not received. 

On Sunday XX/XX/XXXX I received a text with an unrecognized transaction, even that the new card was not received, I reported, account was closed again and new credit card was requested. All charges are being disputed. 

Still I see attempts to use my card in a casino, and I see unrecognized charges in Florida. 

I saw today a new charge in the credit card, still not shipped. 

Total ammount of disputed charges are around XXXX USD.
